name: Scoring system refactor cascade trust split

description: Baseline targeted unit suite for scoring/cascade refactor

asi.hypothesis: Establish fast stable benchmark before refactor changes
asi.notes: All targeted tests green; baseline very fast, expect noise high

description: Extracted stage helpers validateGrammarResponse/classifyProviderFailure and wired provider validation

asi.hypothesis: Split contract validation and error classification without behavior change
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric unchanged vs baseline; keep/discard rule requires improvement
asi.next_action_hint: Bundle functional milestone with broader test benchmark metric or switch metric to coverage/quality proxy
asi.learning: Refactor compiles and targeted suite stays green

description: Noise-floor confirmation rerun of targeted suite before next code mutation

asi.hypothesis: Re-run baseline to estimate variance and avoid false keep from noise
asi.next_action_hint: Change benchmark target to include quality objective or run broader command where optimizations measurable
asi.learning: Runtime floor around 0.4s; transform/import dominates, code-level scoring refactor unlikely to move metric

description: Broadened benchmark to unit + provider E2E integration path for less overfit signal

asi.hypothesis: Use broader integration workload to make refactor quality/perf effects measurable and reduce micro-benchmark noise
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric worse than baseline because workload changed; cannot compare directly under existing metric history
asi.next_action_hint: Re-init experiment with new benchmark target/metric scope before further iterations
asi.learning: Provider E2E path stable and deterministic; good candidate primary workload for refactor safety

name: Scoring refactor safety benchmark (unit + provider e2e)
